  Details:
  Ramped PR8a live: /dao/verify-signature + /dao/check_digital_signature now served by the Python dao_protocol service, not Rails.
  
  - Added exact-match nginx location blocks to the live edgar.conf on seni_ror (backup first, nginx -t ok, graceful reload). Both endpoints proxy to dao_protocol :8010.
  - Verified live with plain curl: check_digital_signature -> 200 + exact JSON, verify-signature -> 422 with the Python verifier's message (Rails would 401 a plain curl via its bot-throttle), and a control /dao route still returns Rails 401 -> only the two exact-match paths moved.
  - Mirrored the change to the repo nginx.conf and updated the EDGAR_DAO_EXTRACTION_PLAN tracker. Only remaining /dao/* work is PR8d (delete the 3 ported Rails actions after a ramp soak).
  
  PRs: sentiment_importer#1089, agentic_ai_context#347.
